# `conan` (cpp ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Hand-written prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly uses this chain when it finds `conan` evidence.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `conan` |
| Ecosystem | `cpp` |
| Detector chain | `conan-detector`, `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `conan.lock`, `conanfile.txt`, `conanfile.py`, `conaninfo.txt` |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `conan`, `syft for bomly-lite` |
